ValidationRule.description: Reason for legal referral is mandatory when sending for Review
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($Setup.Disable_Metadata_Settings__c.Disable_Product_Validation_WF__c == false , $Setup.Application_Config_Settings__c.Bypass_Refer_To_Legal_Validation__c == true, OR( AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Refer_to_Legal__c , '')), ISPICKVAL(Reason_for_Legal__c, '' ) ), AND( ISCHANGED(Refer_to_Legal__c), ISPICKVAL(Refer_to_Legal__c , '') ) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage:
Once refer to legal is set, it cannot be reset to blank.
Reason for legal referral is required when refer to legal is not blank.
